pages.text: 今天是个大晴天，Sam 爸爸要带咘咘去森林里的小集市。"咘咘，出门碰见别人，第一件事做什么呀？"咘咘眨眨眼睛，不知道。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a large gentle golden retriever dog holding hands with a small cute white baby bunny, standing at the entrance of a colorful forest path, morning sunshine, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: Sam 爸爸笑着说："碰见别人，要先笑着说'你好'！这样别人就知道你是个有礼貌的小朋友了。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a golden retriever dog kneeling down to a white baby bunny's eye level, teaching gently, the bunny listening attentively, forest path background, warm light, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 走了一会儿，他们碰到了小刺猬豆豆。豆豆正在路边摘果子。咘咘有点害羞，躲到了 Sam 爸爸身后。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute small hedgehog picking berries from a bush, a shy white baby bunny peeking from behind a golden retriever dog's leg, forest path, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: Sam 爸爸轻轻推了推咘咘："试试看？"咘咘小声地说了一句："豆豆……你好。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small white bunny stepping forward shyly with a tiny wave, facing a hedgehog, the bunny's mouth slightly open saying hello, golden retriever encouraging from behind, forest path, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 豆豆转过头，开心地笑了！"咘咘你好呀！你要吃果子吗？又甜又好吃！"豆豆递了一颗红红的果子给咘咘。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a happy hedgehog offering a bright red berry to a surprised white baby bunny, both smiling, warm and friendly interaction, forest setting, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 咘咘开心极了——原来说你好，就能交到朋友呀！她蹦蹦跳跳地继续走。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cheerful white baby bunny hopping happily along a forest path, holding a red berry, golden retriever walking behind smiling proudly, sunny forest, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 走到小河边，咘咘看到小乌龟慢慢正在晒太阳。这次咘咘没有害羞，大声说："慢慢，你好呀！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny waving enthusiastically at a small turtle sunbathing on a rock by a stream, the bunny confident and happy, sparkling water, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 慢慢慢慢地抬起头，露出一个大大的微笑："咘咘你好！今天太阳好舒服，你要一起晒吗？"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small turtle smiling warmly on a sunny rock, a white baby bunny sitting beside the turtle enjoying the sunshine, river glistening, peaceful and warm scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 到了集市，好热闹啊！咘咘看到卖蜂蜜的大熊伯伯。"大熊伯伯，你好！"咘咘笑着说。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small white baby bunny looking up and greeting a large friendly brown bear behind a honey stall, colorful forest market with lanterns, busy and lively, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 大熊伯伯哈哈大笑："哎呀，这么有礼貌的小朋友！来，送你一小罐蜂蜜尝尝！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a large jolly brown bear laughing and handing a tiny jar of golden honey to a delighted white baby bunny, market stall with honey jars, warm golden light, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 咘咘又看到了卖花的兔妈妈。"兔妈妈，你好！你的花好漂亮啊！"兔妈妈笑眯眯地送了咘咘一朵小雏菊。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny greeting a mother rabbit at a flower stall full of colorful flowers, the mother rabbit giving a small daisy to the baby bunny, charming market scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: NOMI 也在集市上，正在帮别人修东西。咘咘跑过去："NOMI，你好呀！"NOMI 抬头笑了："咘咘今天好有礼貌呀，是不是碰见每个人都打招呼了？"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a raccoon in blue striped sweater fixing something at a market workbench, a white baby bunny running up to greet her, tools around, busy market background, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: NONO 从天上飞下来："我在天上都听到咘咘的声音了！到处都在说你好你好你好！哈哈哈！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a red bird landing playfully next to a white baby bunny in a market, the bird laughing, the bunny giggling, raccoon in blue sweater laughing too, joyful scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 回家的路上，咘咘的小手里拿着果子、蜂蜜、小雏菊。Sam 爸爸问："今天开心吗？"咘咘用力点头："开心！因为每个人对我都好好！"Sam 爸爸说："那是因为你先对别人好好呀。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny walking home at sunset with a golden retriever, the bunny carrying a berry, tiny honey jar, and a daisy flower, golden sunset path through forest, heartwarming father-child moment, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 💡 咘咘今天学到了：碰见别人，先笑着说"你好"！一句小小的你好，就能让别人开心，也能让自己交到好朋友。你好，就是最好的开始！
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, all characters together - white bunny, golden retriever, raccoon in blue sweater, red bird, hedgehog, turtle, big bear, mother rabbit - all waving hello at the viewer, forest market at sunset, group photo feeling, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition
